violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean soda dispenser tray

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice release lever on the Right pop machine needs cleaned. Inside of the cappuccino machine needs to cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall behind bag and box pop rack needs to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
